name: Herbal Lemon Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Finely chopped lemon herbs (lemongrass, lemon thyme, and/or lemon basil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and 1-3/4 cups sugar.
2. Add the eggs and vanilla extract. Beat well.
3. Combine the flour, baking powder, salt, and herbs. Add to the creamed mixture and mix.
4. Drop dough by teaspoonfuls, about 3 inches apart, on a greased cookie sheet.
5. Flatten slightly with a fork or bottom of a cup.
6. Sprinkle lightly with the remaining sugar.
7. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes or until barely browned. Cool slightly, then remove to a rack.
